name: EleFirst Science & Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: EleFirst Science & Technology Co., Ltd. provides information collection systems in China and internationally. It offers smart grid products, such as electricity information collection system solutions, energy management systems, micro grid systems, distribution network automation system solutions, substation automation system solutions, tools, and other solutions. The company also provides health management solutions, including mobile services for medical authorities, hospitals, government communities, communication operators, radio and television networks, enterprises and institutions, and general public. In addition, it offers copyright cloud platforms, such as national digital audiovisual broadcasting service supervision platform and China international digital intellectual property monitoring and protection platform. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Nanjing, China.
